final:
module dram_cell (  
    input clk,  
    input write_enable,  
    input [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [15:0] storage;  

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (write_enable) begin storage <= data_in ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  data_out <= storage ;
  end  
endmodule
